name: psExec
description: Copy and run a service executable on a remote host via PsExec.

beacon_hash.description: Full beacon hash identifying the session that should execute the command.

listener_hash.description: Full listener hash for the target beacon session.

auth_mode.description: Authentication mode accepted by init(): -u explicit credentials, -k Kerberos/current ticket, or -n no password/current token.

service_file.description: Local service executable file path to copy and run.
